issues.issue: Ambiguous getAllResources import — TWO different functions exist: lib/dataActions.ts (grouped by ResourceType) and lib/getAllResources.ts (flat array). Wrong import causes runtime failure.
issues.fix: Explicitly specify import from @/lib/dataActions, require ResourceType import from @cptsd/db.

issues.issue: task-002 is a decision task, not implementation. AI generator cannot 'document a decision'. /support already proves getAllResources() is sufficient.
issues.fix: Delete task-002. Remove from task-003 depends_on. The /support page pattern is sufficient.

issues.issue: Mobile menu does NOT call trackNavigation — only desktop does. Plan says to update trackNavigation in both. Also, /support link must remain unchanged but isn't called out.
issues.fix: Fix acceptance criteria to differentiate desktop (has trackNavigation) vs mobile (only has href). Add criterion that /support links remain unchanged.

issues.issue: No criterion verifying Footer's other links remain intact.
issues.fix: Add criterion: 'Footer still has all original links — only Helplines href changes'.

issues.issue: Scope creep: 4 file updates + build verification + cross-link audit in one task.
issues.fix: Split into task-013a (cross-link updates) and task-013b (build verification only).

issues.issue: resources/page.tsx links to /support for helplines — not updated in plan.
issues.fix: Add task or fold into cross-link audit to update resources/page.tsx href.

issues.issue: /find-help and /support will have near-identical helpline content. No plan for deduplication, redirect, or differentiation.
issues.fix: Add plan-level decision or task: either add cross-link banner on /support pointing to /find-help, or document intentional coexistence.

issues.issue: Cards link to /mental-health-professionals/[slug or _id] but dynamic route existence not verified.
issues.fix: Verify route exists. Existing route is cptsd-main/app/mental-health-professionals/[slug]/page.tsx. Specify exact pattern.

issues.issue: Props typed as any[] — no type safety for helpline resource shape.
issues.fix: Specify actual shape or define ResourceItem interface matching dataActions.ts output.

issues.issue: Creating getFeaturedMentalHealthProfessionals duplicates 30-line mapping from getAllMentalHealthProfessionals. DRY violation.
issues.fix: Add optional filter params to existing function instead of duplicating.

issues.issue: Hardcoded heading text in acceptance criteria is brittle for copy changes.
issues.fix: Use 'empathetic, trauma-informed heading' criterion instead of exact text match.

issues.issue: No spec reference (meta.spec is null). Plan lacks authoritative feature definition.
issues.fix: Add decisions section documenting key choices about /support relationship and canonical helplines destination.
